headline: Morgan Stanley Raises its Price Target on U.S. Bancorp (USB)
summary: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) is one of the 10 Most Undervalued American Stocks to Invest In. On June 29, 2026, Morgan Stanley analyst Manan Gosalia raised the firm’s price target on U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) to $67 from $64 and kept an Equal Weight rating. Gosalia said that even after the bank group’s 17% quarter-to-date rally, Morgan […]

headline: Lemonade shares are trading higher after the company reported better-than-expected Q1 financial results and raised its FY26 sales guidance above estimates.

headline: U.S. Bancorp (USB) to Raise Quarterly Dividend by 3.8%
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 3.41%, U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) is included among the 12 Best NYSE Stocks to Buy for Dividends. As the fifth-largest commercial bank in the United States, U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) works across a diversified mix of businesses, including commercial and institutional banking, business banking, payments, wealth management, and consumer banking.
